caption: Working on a tricky V6 overhang project 🧗‍♂️ The key was trusting the heel hook and committing to the dyno. #bouldering #climbing
First outdoor session of the season at the local crag. Nothing beats real rock. #outdoorbouldering
Coaching session with a beginner who sent their first V2 today! Progress is the best motivation. #climbingcoach
Sunset sessions hit different 🌅 Working on slab technique and balance drills.
Hangboard day. Consistency over intensity — building finger strength one session at a time. #climbingtraining
Group coaching session — four climbers, four breakthroughs. Love seeing the progress! #boulderingcoach
